deviations.description: The process model only requires asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes when local anesthesia is administered to a patient with high anesthesia tolerance. It does not require administering additional anesthesia every 20 minutes, as mandated by Version 2. This results in a direct violation of the new, stricter requirement.
process_model_reference: ask patient about pain, administer additional anesthesia

deviations.description: The process continues to require asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes, which is no longer required by Version 2. This enforces an outdated constraint that is not present in the updated requirement.
